title: magnolia macrophylla var. ashei
intro: Magnolia macrophylla var. ashei, also known as Ashe's magnolia, is a deciduous shrub or small tree native to the southeastern United States. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Ashe's magnolia include potential relief from pain, fever reduction, and the ability to support respiratory health. Ashe's magnolia can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
